summary.headline: SEVERE / CRITICAL
summary.description: Five vectors converging simultaneously: military multi-front expansion, financial warfare declaration, geopolitical credibility collapse, Third Temple acceleration, and theological convergence across all four traditions. New vector added: Information Warfare. Ramadan 1447 overlay active — Laylatul Qadr imminent. Watching for 90.

intel_cards.title: Iran declares banks and financial institutions legitimate targets across Middle East
intel_cards.summary: Iran's joint military command officially declared banks and financial institutions legitimate targets across the Middle East. Abraham Accords financial infrastructure now explicitly in the crosshairs. Markets have not fully priced this.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is a direct targeting declaration, not rhetoric. Markets lag language shifts when energy and financial-system threats converge.

intel_cards.title: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed for 10 days, now being mined
intel_cards.summary: Sen. Murphy confirmed: "The strait has effectively been closed for 10 days. Iran is now mining the strait. This war is costing at least $2B/day." No plan to reopen. 20M barrels/day offline.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is the single cleanest trigger for a fast score jump toward 90. Hormuz closure couples military, economic, and energy stress into one lane.

intel_cards.title: February CPI prints in line — pre-war data, real shock hits April
intel_cards.summary: February CPI: +0.3% MoM / +2.4% YoY. Core: +0.2% MoM / +2.5% YoY — slight dovish surprise on core. This is pre-war data. The real oil shock from $119 crude and Hormuz closure does not appear until the April print.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Dovish core buys the bulls 30-60 minutes. War headlines cap any real rally. The muted print does not cancel energy shock risk — it just hasn't shown up in the data yet.

intel_cards.title: Hezbollah opens second front — IDF expanding Lebanon operations
intel_cards.summary: Hezbollah opening second front from Lebanon. IDF expanding south Lebanon evacuation orders to 50+ villages. Five Iranian missile barrages at Israel today alone. Iran simultaneously targeting Gulf states. West Bank under full lockdown. This is not a single-front event anymore.
intel_cards.analyst_note: The significance is convergence — multiple fronts reinforcing each other simultaneously. Each front individually is manageable. Together they compound.

doctrine.title: Netanyahu Messiah Doctrine — Fully Documented
doctrine.quote: "We will make it to the return of the Messiah, but this will not happen next Thursday."
doctrine.quote_source: — PRIME MINISTER BENJAMIN NETANYAHU // MARCH 12, 2026 // ACTIVE WARTIME STATEMENT

cards.text: The late Rebbe Schneerson told a young Netanyahu 30 years ago: "You will be the prime minister who passes the scepter to the Messiah." That prophecy is now circulating openly in Israeli media during active war.

Netanyahu framed explicitly as an accelerationist — someone who could precipitate or force God's intervention in history. Kohanim (Temple priests) being actively recruited by his government for Temple service.
Netanyahu on record to i24: "If you're asking if I have a sense of mission, historically and spiritually, the answer is yes." Accepted amulet of Greater Israel map saying "This is my vision."
